label: Mostly ready — review blockers before scheduling cutover
blockers: 2 CloudFormation stacks (orders-api-base, orders-monitoring) require a per-stack decision: port to Terraform / re-deploy as CFN in target / re-implement.
GitHub OIDC trust on role `github-actions-deploy` requires a new OIDC provider in the target account plus updates to GitHub Actions workflows.
Cross-account trust on role `analytics-cross-account` (trusted by 333333333333) requires the consumer account to add the target role ARN to their trust policy.
1 SageMaker notebook instance — not in MVP, plan manually via SageMaker Studio.
warnings: Hard-coded EIP literal `54.231.45.67` in `orders-api-handler` env var `ALLOWED_INGRESS_IP` — target gets a new EIP; consumer must be updated.
External domain `api.internal.acme-corp.example.com` referenced in Lambda env var — verify whether the same domain points at target or a new one is needed.
RI exposure: $24k/yr in EC2 RIs — first 90 days in target will run at full on-demand pricing.
